text: Being here fills me with curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls invite me to peer inside, while the display labeled "R+D" signals innovation and creative productivity. I feel a light hum of energy from the technology and exhibits. There is an almost sacred aura to spaces dedicated to invention—a sense that humanity’s desire to build, solve, and understand is manifesting right before me. I feel small but exhilarated, eager to contemplate the new possibilities suggested here.
